building.description: Name of the building, if any

door.description: Identifier of the door, if any

floor.description: Identifier of the floor, if any

housingComplex.description: Name of the housing complex, if any

ownerName.description: Owner name, this information can be restricted

stairs.description: Identifier of the stair, if any

streetCode.description: Street code, an unique identifier of the street, hidden for unlisted number

streetName.description: Street name, hidden for unlisted number

streetNumber.description: Street number, usually a number and an indication if applicable (B for bis, T for ter, etc...) and hidden for unlisted number

distance.description: Distance from original source, if applicable

streetCode.description: Street code, an unique identifier of the street

streetNumber.description: Street number, usually a number and an indication if applicable (B for bis, T for ter, etc...) and hidden for unlisted number

reference.description: Identifier which refer to a building uniquely

floors.description: List of floor indentifier, "_NA_" if no identifier is available

stair.description: Stair identifier, "_NA_" if no identifier is available

availablePairs.description: Number of available pairs. This is given only for an eligibility test.

maxAvailablePairs.description: Number of maximun available pairs using desaturation. This is given only for an eligibility test.

nra.description: NRA ("Nœud de raccordement abonné" in french) is an identifier of the building where is the Main Distribution Frames for the copper line. This is given only for an eligibility test.

sectionsLengths.description: Sections lengths of the copper line. This is given only for an eligibility test.

underConstruction.description: Is the line under construction ? This is given only for an eligibility test.

unlistedNumber.description: Is the number unlisted ? ("sur liste rouge" in french)

dedicatedfiberRequest.description: Check for Dedicated Fiber FTTO/FTTE eligibility ?

profiberRequest.description: Check for Pro Fiber FTTH eligibility ?

dedicatedfiberRequest.description: Check for Dedicated Fiber FTTO/FTTE eligibility ?

profiberRequest.description: Check for Pro Fiber FTTH eligibility ?

portability.description: Portability details of the line number

nro.description: NRO ("Nœud de raccordement optique" in french) is an identifier of the building where is the Optical Distribution Frame (ODF) of the fiber

eRdv.description: Whether or not it is possible to book a meeting online

phoneCall.description: Whether or not it is possible to be be called by phone to book a meeting

connectivity.eligibility.MeetingSlot.description: Represents a time slot for a meeting

slotId.description: Represent a meeting id for a fiber collect operator

uiCode.description: An opaque string that represents an intervention unit

connectivity.eligibility.Meetings.description: List of available meeting time slots

canBookFakeMeeting.description: Whether or not it is possible to book a fake meeting

availabilityDate.description: Availability date of the offer (if code of non eligibility is COPPER_NOT_YET_AVAILABLE, FIBER_NOT_YET_AVAILABLE or PRODUCT_NOT_YET_AVAILABLE)

activationTypes.description: Activation type list, for copper only

eligible.description: Is the endpoint eligible to this offer ?

estimatedDownloadRate.description: Estimated download rate, for copper and non guaranteed offers only

estimatedUploadRate.description: Estimated upload rate, for copper and non guaranteed offers only

multiOtp.description: Is eligible to multiple Optical Termination Points (OTP) ? For fiber only

reasons.description: Reasons when not eligible, if any

underConditions.description: Warnings to consider when eligible, if any

code.description: Product code, an unique identifier for the product

pairs.description: Number of copper pairs required, for copper only

quarantineEndDate.description: Date of the end of quarantine, if any
